Title: COMMENT ON TABLE
Description: Add or update or remove a comment for a table

Note : By specifying IS NULL or IS '' you remove the comment for the table object.
If the table is dropped, the associated comment (including the comments for the columns) is also removed. Note : it is not allowed or possible to add comments for temporary tables in schema "tmp".
See also: CREATE TABLE , DROP TABLE .
Examples:
COMMENT ON TABLE [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
IS  { 'comment text' | NULL | '' }
COMMENT ON TABLE sys.comments IS 'contains comments on all db objects'
